summary: Phase 3 Integration Testing - Documents Tab and File Operations

features_tested.notes: Projects page loads with list of projects and View buttons
Click View on first project loads Project Detail with all tabs
Documents tab appears as 7th tab in Project Detail
Shows upload zone (data-testid='file-upload-zone') and file list
Successfully uploaded test_document.txt via drag-drop zone
Download button opens file in new tab /api/files/{file_id}/download
Delete button removes file, shows 'File deleted' toast
All 6 existing tabs clickable: Rough Estimate, Scope, Payment Schedule, Additional, Deduction, Payment Summary

critical_code_review_comments: FileUpload component properly uses data-testid attributes for testing
File operations use withCredentials: true for cookie-based auth
Category is correctly passed as 'project-documents' for project files
seed_data_creation: Created test_document.txt via file upload during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Documents tab file operations (upload/download/delete) fully functional. All 7 tabs in Project Detail working. Login with password works for admin user.
